Plaintiff Lisa Murphy'S Motion To Compel Further And Complete Discovery Responses To Request For Production Of Documents (Set Two)
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Heidi C. Larson, Esq. of SQUIRE SANDERS 213-689-5130, appearing for defendant / moving party Check 'n Go
Robert Spencer, Esq. and Jade Butman, Esq., of KELLER GROVER 415-543-1305, appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Lisa Murphy

Ruling:
After hearing, Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents (set #2) is granted in part, denied in part. Defendant to produce: specified portions of settlement / arbitration documents as previously promised, deposition transcripts of former employees and person most knowledgeable with personal and disciplinary information subject to redaction, the universal schedule or memo, and job duty information about salaried positions. Judge: Bruce Chan. Reporter: Claudia A. Bettucchi, CSR #12214 (Tel: 415-274-9977)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel A Complete Discovery Response To Special Interrogatory No. 8; Appendix Of Non-California Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Eric A. Grover, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Lisa Murphy
Casey T. Mccoy, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Check'n Go of California, Inc.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted with modification. Plaintiff Lisa Murphy's motion to compel a further response to special interrogatory #8 is granted in part. As to current employees who are either assistant store managers, store managers, or general managers, defendant is ordered to produce the names of such persons. Plaintiff may contact them through counsel for defendant. As to former employees, the parties shall meet and confer as to preparing a letter of notification pursuant to Belaire-West landscape Inc. v. Superior Court (2007) 149 Cal. App. 4th 554.
MODIFICATION. That Belaire letter shall be provided to current employees as well. Compliance with notification by August 1, 2008. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Court reporter: Kathy Nelson, CSR # 9796
